use_cases: Collect user satisfaction ratings after a purchase or interaction
Gather quick feedback on content quality in media applications
Enable sentiment polling in SaaS customer feedback workflows
Display emotional response collection in survey interfaces
Add playful rating interaction to onboarding or review flows
ai_summary: An interactive feedback slider component featuring an animated smiley face that morphs between three emotional states (BAD, NOT BAD, GOOD). Built with Framer Motion, it combines a color-coded slider track with a dynamic SVG smile icon and eye animations. The component transitions smoothly between states with custom colors and expressions, making it ideal for collecting quick user sentiment in a visually engaging way.
